title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, December 22 2021
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, December 22 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, December 22 2021
summary:
Main
We are still seeing some current activity emerge in s&p and timecharter markets, although now with Christmas almost upon us that has come to a close. On the tanker clean side, sentiment has remained soft with slow activity throughout, as Omicron fears have stemmed travel plans over the festive season, cutting short-term demand.
